title: SQL MCP server now available (Beta)
body: Databricks now provides a [SQL managed MCP server](/aws/en/agents/mcp/managed-mcp#available-managed-servers) that allows AI agents to execute SQL queries directly against Unity Catalog tables using SQL warehouses. The SQL MCP server is available at:`https://<workspace-hostname>/api/2.0/mcp/sql`. See [Databricks managed MCP servers](/aws/en/agents/mcp/managed-mcp).
